summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Energy Optimization SaaS POC. All 6 core endpoints tested successfully with full integration validation.

POST /api/poc/upload-bill - PDF upload successful with parsed extraction status
POST /api/poc/run-analysis - Analysis pipeline working: 6 anomalies, 3 advices, complete KPIs and prediction
Price integration (Energy Charts API) - Status: ok
PDF extraction pipeline - Working with parsed status
Analytics engine - Generating anomalies, smart advices with ROI, and cost predictions
